Description.SourceString:
One sad part of human nature is that they will constantly strive to craft deadlier and deadlier weapons. Iron crossbow bolts were harder than their bronze counterpart, capable of penetrating the toughest garou armour.

Obrimex, of the garou, once tried to replicate these weapons. He crafted little sharpened tubes of iron that he felt would match their power. Alas, the garou hadn’t yet crafted crossbow technology, and throwing these little metal darts largely proved to be irritating rather than dangerous.
